ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: your sql server connection string - store in user secrets

Crypto.PassPhrase: a really long pass phrase - store in user secrets

Email.Host: your smtp host - store in user secrets
Email.Username: your smtp username - store in user secrets
Email.Password: your smtp password - store in user secrets

Recaptcha.ProjectId: your google cloud project id (e.g., projects/my-project-id) - store in user secrets
Recaptcha.ApiKey: your google cloud recaptcha enterprise api key - store in user secrets
